mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET user_id = #{userId}, notification_type = #{notificationType}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, channel = #{channel}, send_status = #{sendStatus}, read_status = #{readStatus}, send_time = #{sendTime}, read_time = #{readTime}, extra_data = #{extraData}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY send_time DESC
SELECT * FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_status = #{readStatus} ORDER BY send_time DESC
SELECT * FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND notification_type = #{type} ORDER BY send_time DESC
SELECT * FROM notification ORDER BY send_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET read_status = #{readStatus}, read_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
